name: Keynan Wehliye Adan
bio: Hon. Keynan Wehliye Adan is the current sitting Member of the National Assembly for Eldas Constituency, Wajir County, serving in the 13th Parliament (2022–2027) under the Jubilee Party. The longest-serving MP and "Father of the House," he was first elected in 1997, representing Wajir West.

He won the Kamukunji seat in the 2022 Kenyan general election, having first entered parliament in 2011 through the Kamukunji by-election.

She was first elected in 2017 and re-elected in 2022, winning the Vihiga Woman Representative seat with 52,507 votes.
